# W3T1 Implementation Plan

## Task Goal
Define the full `Dimension` trait contract in `src/dimension/mod.rs`, including sealed bounds, checked size validation, dynamic conversion hooks, and read-only axis lookup.

## Related Design Documents
- `design/02-dimension.md` §5.1
- `design/02-dimension.md` §5.2
- `design/02-dimension.md` §10
- `design/26-error.md` §4.2

## Dependencies
- W2T8

## Files to Create/Modify
- `src/dimension/mod.rs`

## Implementation Details
- Import:
  - `core::fmt::Debug`
  - `crate::private::Sealed`
  - `crate::error::XenonError`
  - `crate::dimension::{Axis, IxDyn}` or equivalent internal paths
- Define constant:
  ```rust
  pub const MAX_DIMENSION: usize = usize::MAX;
  ```
- Define the public sealed trait exactly:
  ```rust
  pub trait Dimension: Sealed + Clone + PartialEq + Eq + Debug + Send + Sync + 'static {
      const NDIM: Option<usize>;
      fn ndim(&self) -> usize;
      fn slice(&self) -> &[usize];
      fn checked_size(&self) -> Result<usize, XenonError>;
      fn checked(&self) -> Result<(), XenonError>;
      fn into_dyn(self) -> IxDyn;
      fn try_from_dyn(dyn_dim: IxDyn) -> Result<Self, XenonError>
      where
          Self: Sized;
      fn try_from_slice(slice: &[usize]) -> Result<Self, XenonError>
      where
          Self: Sized;
      fn axis(&self, axis: Axis) -> Result<usize, XenonError> { ... }
  }
  ```
- `axis(&self, axis: Axis)` must return `XenonError::InvalidAxis { operation: "Dimension::axis".into(), axis: axis.index(), ndim: self.ndim(), shape: self.slice().into() }` on failure.
- Add internal extension trait exactly as design guidance:
  ```rust
  pub(crate) trait DimensionExt: Dimension {
      fn slice_mut(&mut self) -> &mut [usize];
      fn set_axis(&mut self, axis: Axis, value: usize) -> Result<(), XenonError> { ... }
      fn last_axis(&self) -> Option<Axis> { ... }
      fn first_axis(&self) -> Option<Axis> { ... }
      fn contains_zero(&self) -> bool { ... }
      fn iter(&self) -> core::slice::Iter<'_, usize> { ... }
  }
  ```

## Test Plan
- Unit tests:
  - `test_dimension_axis_success`
  - `test_dimension_axis_invalid_axis_error`
  - `test_dimension_ext_contains_zero`
  - `test_dimension_ext_first_last_axis`
- Integration scenario:
  - static and dynamic implementations satisfy the same contract once W3T2 and W3T5 land.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `Dimension` matches the design doc method-for-method.
- The trait is sealed through `crate::private::Sealed`.
- `checked()` remains a public checked entry point separate from `checked_size()`.
- `DimensionExt` stays `pub(crate)` and is not part of the stable public API.

## Development Workflow
1. Write failing tests for `axis()` and `DimensionExt` helpers using temporary local mock coverage only if needed.
2. Define `MAX_DIMENSION`, `Dimension`, and `DimensionExt` exactly.
3. Update imports and module re-exports.
4. Run focused dimension tests and stop.
